prompt: Fix the application crash on API error and resolve the issue where cached data re-filters unnecessarily.

models.justification: Identifies that async void causes unhandled exceptions and that LINQ deferred execution causes re-filtering. Corrects both logically and architecturally.
Fixes symptoms with try/catch and .ToList(), but retains the async void anti-pattern.
Only addresses the async void issue, ignoring the performance/caching bug.
